title: Chapter 176
content:
Chapter 175

It wasn’t like I was obsessed with Rayla or something. This wasn’t a play to have her heart, mind, body, and soul.

This was just a kink of mine. Replacing her husband. And her loving it.

Her admitting it. That was what got me going. I had done this many times before, sometimes when the husbands of the women were still alive. Just them calling me husband while I railed them was a turn on I couldn’t relate to.

Fucking them in front of their husbands while they called me husband was an even bigger turn on, but that was only seldom possible.

While I was unable to have Rayla call me her husband in front of her husband because he was now gone, I could still have her call me one, and given that I was also her son in this body, that was wonderful on its own.

So…

“Admit it, mother. Call me your husband.”

“Aannhh… No… unnnggg~~”

Rayla moaned but still said the same, not giving me the satisfaction of a yes, but still making it fun for me by resisting.

“Why not, Mother? Why not marry me and call me your husband?” I asked, thrusting again and again in her ass without holding back.

“Haaannhhh~~!!”

“Aaannhh~~!!”

“HAAGGNNHGAHH~~!!”

And she came…

I let her collect herself, letting her gather her breath while still keeping my dick inside of her, holding back my orgasm, and having a hard time doing so because of how hard she was putting pressure on my dick through her ass.

I kissed her shoulder and began to slowly thrust again once she had recovered.

“Hnngg~~!”

“Why not, mother?” I asked her again, in case she had forgotten.

“Be-because… I’m o-old… you have to ma-marry a good… young woman… and ask for many ch-children with her… If you marry me… you won’t get any more children… fr-from the tem-temple…”

How was that relevant?

Well, I didn’t ask. Why would I anyway? I could still convince her.

“Then you just have to marry me in secret, Mother. You can call me your husband, love me when we're alone like this, and I can love you like you’re my wife.” I softly said every word slowly in her ear, almost like a demon whispering to her, tempting her with sweet nothings.

She moaned with every word that entered her ear, her body trembling with each thrust. I could tell her mind was fuzzy, and she was under the influence of sex to the point that she wouldn’t be able to think rationally.

“Annghh~~!”

She kept moaning, without answering me, so an idea struck me at that point, and I stopped.

“Haann…?”

There was confusion in her moan, and when she saw I wasn’t moving, she moved back on her own as she asked, “Why did you… stop, Jack?”

“Answer my question, mother. Will you be my wife?” I asked, holding her hips so she wouldn’t be able to move.

“I told you… I can’t marry you…” She replied, trying to move against me again, but couldn’t because she couldn’t overpower me, “You wouldn’t be able to have any more… children.”

Again, I couldn’t see the relevance, but I didn’t care and said, “Then we can be husband and wife in secret. You can love me, and I can love you like this…”

I said the last part, while thrusting once inside her, just rough enough to move her insides entirely.

“Aaannnggg~~!!”

She couldn’t answer for some time. She just recovered with deep breaths, and finally, after some time, she asked, “O-only in secret, right? Only when we-we’re together. You will… you will marry a young woman… alright? And have children with her… alright?”

Still didn’t know why she was so concerned about me having children, but I nodded and replied, since it didn’t matter to me, “As you wish. I will marry someone else, but love you just as much.”

“A-alright then… I-I’ll be your wi… wife…” Rayla finally replied, and I stopped putting pressure on her hip, allowing her to push back, and as soon as she did…

“AAANNNGHHH!!!”

She came.

Just from that one thrust.

But I didn’t let her rest this time.

Holding her properly in that spooning position, I turned her face to me and began to kiss her.

It was an animalistic kiss, one you do with deep passion. While I did that, one of my hands went from underneath her and grabbed her soft tit while my other hand held her leg in the air from her soft thigh, and finally, preparing myself, I began to piston her ass.

There was nothing more said after that. Rayla was too far gone in the pleasure to say anything. I fucked her to the best of my abilities, but I couldn’t go on for a long time, because she soon came again, the fourth time in that position alone, and I couldn’t take it anymore.

Rayla was extremely tight now, and her ass was squeezing me to the point it was torture. It was a miracle that I had been able to hold back until now.

“AAAHHEEEUUUNNGGGGG!!!!!”

“KUGH!!”

She moaned out loud, and I grunted as I emptied my reserves in her for the fifth time.

“Haa… Haa…”

“I love you… wife…” I said between heavy breaths.

While I wasn’t expecting anything in return since I was just reminding her mind of this before she passed out so this would remain on her mind for days, I was surprised when she reciprocated with…

“I love you too… husband…”

And she passed out with that.

Too bad. I wanted to fuck her one more time after that. Hearing her call me her husband was a better turn on than I was expecting. Well, I couldn’t force her any more than this. She was already at her limits. Better to have mercy on her.

My dick returned to its depressing stub shape, and I couldn’t help but sigh looking at it. Looking at Rayla sleeping next to me, I wanted to activate the state of completion just to prove my manhood because just looking at that stub was humiliating.

Haa…

I took my mind off of that and turned to the system to forget about that thing.

And what I saw really did make me forget about my dick. It even made me forget about the heavenly beauty sleeping right next to me.

I sat up straight so fast because I couldn’t believe what I was reading.

[Repeated discharge assimilation of the user’s essence has been detected in Rayla ???]

[High-purity essence has enhanced the potential structure of the recipient]

[Error]

[Analyzing effects…]

[An error has been detected]

[Error has been analyzed]

[The recipient, Rayla ???, is already at the maximum latent potential capacity]

[Further refinement of Rayla ???’s body quality is impossible]

[Redirecting effects]

[Partial seal suppressions detected on target]

[Essence has begun to weaken the unknown sealed placed on Rayla ???]

[Seal integrity reduced by 4.7%]

[All stats +4.7%]

[Warning: The seal of extremely high complexity. Origin unknown. Further analysis is required]

The fuck…?

I almost froze as I read the fine text on the glowing hologram. And then my mind raced as I read it all again.

Potential…? Maximum potential?

Just those words were enough to rewire the circuits in my brain. If I wasn’t wrong, then anal sex and creampies could enhance the potential of a person.

That was almost impossible. It was funny too, you know, because another rational way of raising one’s potential was eating a dragon's heart, and that came with risks of its own, such as mana overload and other problems of the same category. In other words, nothing was simple.

But then, here I was, just finding out that anal sex could increase the potential of one’s body…

Haha…

I couldn’t help but feel like a fool.

I did so much to make an artificial dragon heart to have enough mana to go through a partial body reconstruction, but even that only worked to the point of increasing my mana a little and giving me enough to construct the mana vessels for my dick.

But I fuck Rayla in her ass a little, and her potential had increased?

Well, not that it did.

Reading it all again, I discovered that there was a seal placed on Rayla. Now, Rayla was a mystery of her own. Her potential was high since the beginning, and even though her talent was shit, her mana was amazingly pure.

Made me wonder if her low talent was because of this seal as well.

There were so many questions in my mind now.

The one at the top of that list wasn’t the fact that I could increase a woman’s potential, or my mother’s past.

No, the first one was: Just who the hell was Jack?

This… this wasn’t all mine. Just putting mana in someone didn’t help raise their level.

This was Jack’s ability. While I could put magical abilities like anti-aging in my semen, that was it. Nothing could go beyond that. But Jack could.

That made me all the more curious about Jack’s bloodline.
